channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports NFL power rankings after Week 7 of 2024 NFL season
item.description: To no one's surprise, the Kansas City Chiefs remain No. 1 in our power rankings, but what about the rest of the league? Find now how we rank the 32 teams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fernando Valenzuela, former MLB pitching phenom, dies at 63
item.description: Fernando Valenzuela, who took the baseball world by storm in 1981, has died at the age of 63. Valenzuela pitched for 17 seasons in the majors and won two World Series titles.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fernando Valenzuela, Mexican-born pitcher whose feats for Dodgers fueled 'Fernandomania,' dies at 63
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fernando Valenzuela, the Mexican-born phenom for the Los Angeles Dodgers who inspired “Fernandomania” while winning the NL Cy Young Award and Rookie of the Year in 1981, has died. He was 63.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ohtani's historic 50-50 ball sells at auction for nearly $4.4M amid ongoing dispute over ownership
item.description: Shohei Ohtani’s 50th home run ball has sold at auction for nearly $4.4 million, a record high price not just for a baseball, but for any ball in any sport.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Flaherty to start World Series Game 1 for Dodgers - Rapid Reaction
item.description: LOS ANGELES - Game 1 of the World Series will have a SoCal feel. Not just because it will be played at Dodger Stadium, but both starting pitchers have area ties.
item.dc:creator: Rahshaun Haylock, KTLA 5

item.title: Celtics tie, but don't break, NBA record with 29 3-pointers. Then they miss 13 3s in a row
item.description: The Boston Celtics tied the NBA record by making 29 3-pointers in their victory over the New York Knicks.
item.dc:creator: Jimmy Golen, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tatum, Celtics celebrate Banner 18 by making record-tying 29 3-pointers and crushing Knicks 132-109
item.description: Jayson Tatum continued Boston’s Banner 18 celebration by scoring 37 points and making eight of the Celtics’ NBA record-tying 29 3-pointers as Boston ran away with a 132-109 victory over the New York Knicks on opening night.
item.dc:creator: Jimmy Golen, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bucs' Todd Bowles defends decision to keep Chris Godwin in game despite small chance of winning
item.description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers head coach Todd Bowles defended his decision to keep star receiver Chris Godwin in the game despite a small chance of winning prior to his ankle injury.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Diana Taurasi still mulling over decision to retire or play another year
item.description: Diana Taurasi is still mulling over her decision whether to play another season in the WNBA or retire. The 20-year veteran and future Hall of Famer told The Associated Press on Tuesday that she’s going to take her time on deciding what she wants to do. “I don’t take retirement lightly.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: After bye week, Bears hope to maintain momentum for upcoming key games
item.description: Given a week off after their offense got rolling against Jacksonville in London, Caleb Williams and the Chicago Bears might have been better served without a Week 7 bye.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego FC to play St. Louis in inaugural home match at Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: Major League Soccer unveiled the first match and home opener for San Diego FC on Monday as they approach their inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Jets struggles continue despite coaching changes and new additions
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The fish stinks from the head down. The Jets are a dysfunctional mess, and it begins with the Jets owner Woody Johnson. Since 2000, when he bought the team, the Jets record is 170 and 224.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: WNBA champion, Bay Area native shattered records in latest series
item.description: (KRON) – The New York Liberty officially won a WNBA Championship after defeating the Minnesota Lynx in a nail-biting Game 5 (67-62). Liberty point guard and Miramonte High School alum Sabrina Ionescu won her first chip with multiple accolades.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: USF downs UAB, 35-25, outscoring Blazers 28-6 down the stretch
item.description: TAMPA (usf) - Returning to Raymond James Stadium for the first time in three weeks, South Florida (3-4; 1-2 American) outscored UAB 28-6 down the stretch to notch its first American Athletic Conference win of the season, 35-25, over the Blazers (1-6; 0-4 American) on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: National League Champions: Dodgers advance to the World Series with 10-5 win over Mets
item.description: Tommy Edman and Will Smith homered to send Shohei Ohtani into the World Series for the first time, and the Los Angeles Dodgers eliminated the New York Mets with a 10-5 victory in Game 6 of the NL Championship Series on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Andy Ludwig steps down as Utes offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Following another dismal offensive performance against TCU, Andy Ludwig has stepped down as Utah's offensive coordinator and quarterbacks coach. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham released a statement Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Moody agrees to 3-year, $39M extension with Warriors: report
item.description: (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors and guard Moses Moody have agreed to a multi-year contract extension, ESPN's Shams Charania posted Sunday evening on X. The extension is reportedly for three years and $39 million, which is an average annual value of about $13 million.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: CMU inducts BJ Russell into the Hall of Honor
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado Mesa University recently honored two former athletes, linebacker BJ Russell and volleyball setter Jordyn Moody, for their outstanding contributions to CMU athletics.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: USU gives up 21 points in fourth quarter, lose to New Mexico
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State's losing streak hit six games, and this one was the most hearbreaking. Devon Dampier and Eli Sanders had touchdown runs in the final 3:53 to rally New Mexico to a 50-45 victory over Utah State on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Yankees get to Guardians closer Clase again, score 2 runs in 9th to win 8-6 and take 3-1 ALCS lead
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Cleveland All-Star closer Emmanuel Clase gave up two runs in the ninth inning and the New York Yankees moved closer to another World Series, beating the Guardians 8-6 on Friday night to take a 3-1 lead in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alonso and Mets extend season again, beating Dodgers 12-6 to send NLCS back to LA for Game 6
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Not easy to knock out these New York Mets. Pete Alonso golfed an early three-run homer and the Mets hammered an ineffective Jack Flaherty, extending the National League Championship Series with a 12-6 victory over the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: These Dick's Sporting Goods stores will sell championship gear after closing hours if the Dodgers win on Friday
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers can punch their tickets to the World Series on Friday night, and Southern California fans itching to get their hands on some championship merchandise can do so quickly.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Tampa Bay Rowdies move to IMG Academy for final 2 regular-season games
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rowdies will play their final two regular-season matches at IMG Academy due to the impacts of Hurricane Milton and Helene.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lonzo Ball makes long-awaited return from knee injuries, scores 10 in Bulls' preseason game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the moment finally arrived, after multiple knee surgeries and one grueling rehab, Lonzo Ball raised his right arm and blew a kiss to the cheering United Center crowd. Fans rose to their feet as the announcement echoed through the arena: “Checking in for the Chicago Bulls! No.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9
